tooltip_tab_transcription: Configure the primary transcription service (API, model, language, etc.).
tooltip_tab_rephrase: Configure automatic rephrasing or prompting of your transcribed text using a secondary AI model.
tooltip_tab_transformations: Define custom prompts for manual, selection-based rephrasing/transformations.
tooltip_tab_general: General application settings like UI language, logging options, etc.
api_key_tooltip: Your API key for the selected service (e.g., OpenAI or Groq).
api_endpoint_tooltip: The endpoint URL of the API for the transcription service.
model_tooltip: The specific AI model to use for transcription.
temperature_tooltip: Controls randomness. Lower values (e.g., 0.0) make the output more deterministic. Higher values make it more creative.
hotkey_tooltip: The key combination to press to start/stop recording.
push_to_talk_tooltip: If enabled, recording only runs while the transcription hotkey is held down. Releasing the hotkey stops recording.
windows_keep_mic_hot_checkbox: Keep microphone prewarmed for faster recording start (Windows only)
windows_keep_mic_hot_tooltip: If enabled, WhisperTyper keeps a background microphone reader active on Windows to reduce clipped audio at the start of a recording. This may use the microphone continuously while the app is running.
windows_keep_mic_hot_idle_label: Let microphone sleep after idle minutes:
windows_keep_mic_hot_idle_tooltip: If the microphone has not been used for this many minutes, WhisperTyper stops the Windows prewarm reader until the next recording starts.
min_recording_label: Do not transcribe recordings shorter than:
min_recording_tooltip: Recordings shorter than this are treated as a cancel and are not transcribed, so an accidental tap can be undone by immediately stopping again. Set to 0 to disable.
input_language_tooltip: 'Detect Language' may work, but specifying the language is more accurate.
gain_tooltip: Increases the volume of your microphone if you are too quiet. 0 dB is no change. Positive values amplify.
transcription_prompt_tooltip: Provide hints to the AI to improve accuracy for specific words, names, or formatting.
ffmpeg_tooltip: Path to the ffmpeg binary (or the folder containing it). Leave empty to auto-detect ffmpeg on your PATH. When ffmpeg is available, you can pick video files (mp4, mov, mkv, …) to transcribe — the audio track is extracted to a temporary MP3 (128 kbps) first.
ffmpeg_path_placeholder: Auto-detect on PATH (or enter a path to ffmpeg)
ffmpeg_status_not_found: FFmpeg not found — video files can't be transcribed. Install it or set the path above.
liveprompt_enable_tooltip: Enables or disables the LivePrompting feature.
liveprompt_help_tooltip:
LivePrompting allows you to give direct instructions to the AI.
If your recording starts with a trigger word (e.g., 'prompt'), the entire transcription will be treated
as a command for the AI to execute, using the 'LivePrompting System Prompt'.
This is useful for tasks like summarizing, translating, or reformatting text on the fly.
liveprompt_help_button_tooltip: Click to show a detailed explanation of the LivePrompting feature.
liveprompt_trigger_words_tooltip:
If one of these words (case-insensitive) appears at the start of your transcription,
the 'LivePrompting' system prompt will be used to rephrase the text.
Useful for direct instructions to the AI.
liveprompt_trigger_scan_depth_tooltip:
Only check for trigger words within the first X words of the transcription.
This prevents accidental triggers later in the text.
liveprompt_strip_trigger_checkbox: Remove trigger word (and preceding text) before rephrasing
liveprompt_strip_trigger_tooltip:
When enabled, everything up to and including the trigger word is removed, so only the instruction after it is sent to the AI (e.g. "… as an instruction. Write …" → "Write …").
Disable this if a trigger word can appear naturally inside your instruction.
liveprompt_system_prompt_tooltip:
The system instruction sent to the AI when a trigger word is detected.
The transcription itself is used as the user input.
generic_rephrase_enable_checkbox: Enable Generic Rephrasing (if liveprompting disabled OR no trigger word is found)
generic_rephrase_prompt_tooltip: The instruction for the AI on a generic rephrase (e.g., 'Make this more polite').
shared_api_group_tooltip: These API settings are used for all rephrasing and LivePrompting operations.
rephrase_context_checkbox: Use selected text as context when using LivePrompting via trigger word
rephrase_context_tooltip:
If checked, any text you have selected on screen will be automatically added
as context to the prompt when a trigger word is used.
test_api_button_tooltip: Sends a simple request to verify the API settings.
api_test_unexpected_response_text:
The API returned an unexpected response:

{response}
api_test_exception_text:
An error occurred during the API test:

{error}
rephrase_api_settings_missing: Please fill in all API settings (URL, Key, Model) before testing.
transformations_info: Define up to {max_entries} rephrasing prompts for post-processing transcriptions.
restore_clipboard_checkbox: Restore clipboard after use (If disabled: Will copy the transcript to the clipboard)
debug_logging_checkbox: Enable debug logging (more details in log)
file_logging_checkbox: Write log file to application folder (WhisperTyper.log)
redact_log_checkbox: Redact transcript/prompt text in the log file
redact_log_tooltip: When enabled, only the first few characters of transcripts and prompts are written to the log; the rest is redacted. Recommended for privacy. Enabled by default.
play_last_recording_tooltip: Plays the last recording with the default system player
update_git_missing_text: 'git' was not found on your PATH. Install Git (or add it to PATH) to update from here.
update_up_to_date_text: Already up to date — no changes were pulled, so no restart is needed.
hotkey_register_failed_message: Hotkey {hotkey} could not be registered (another app may be using it) and will not fire.
input_device_fallback_message: Input device “{device}” could not be opened – recording from the system default instead.
transcription_failed_message: Transcription failed. See dialog for details.
validation_warning_text: There seem to be issues with your settings (warnings only / will still save):
quit_dialog_text: Are you sure you want to quit?
post_rephrase_hotkey_label: Hotkey to show post-rephrase options for selected text:
post_rephrase_hotkey_tooltip: Press this hotkey when text is selected to show a menu with your custom transformations.
about_dialog_text:
WhisperTyper

A simple tool to transcribe your voice to text and rephrase it using various AI models.
transformations_tab_description:
Here you can define custom text transformations.
When you press the configured hotkey with text selected, a menu with your defined captions will appear.
Clicking a button will rephrase the selected text using the corresponding prompt.
This feature uses the 'Shared API Settings' from the 'Rephrasing' tab.
systray_double_click_copy_checkbox: Enable double click on SysTray to copy transcript
quit_without_confirmation_tooltip: If enabled, the app quits immediately without the "Are you sure?" confirmation dialog.
macos_input_monitoring_text:
WhisperTyper needs Input Monitoring permission to detect global hotkeys across macOS.
Please go to System Settings > Privacy & Security > Input Monitoring and enable this application there.
The app might need to be restarted.
macos_accessibility_text:
WhisperTyper needs Accessibility permission to send keyboard shortcuts and insert text into other apps.
Please go to System Settings > Privacy & Security > Accessibility and enable this application there.
The app might need to be restarted.
macos_microphone_text:
WhisperTyper needs permission to access your microphone for recording.
Please go to System Settings > Privacy & Security > Microphone and enable it for this application.
The app might need to be restarted.
macos_hotkey_text: On macOS, hotkeys cannot be captured automatically. Please enter the desired key combination manually into the text field (e.g., `<cmd>+<shift>+f`).
macos_hotkey_restart_text: The hotkey has been changed. Please restart the application for the new hotkey to become active.
rephrasing_finished_macos_message: Rephrasing complete. Text copied to clipboard.
alt_clipboard_lib_checkbox: Use alternative library for Copy/Paste (Better compatibility on macOS)
alt_clipboard_lib_tooltip: If copy/paste actions are unreliable, this library (pyautogui) might work better. It's a common workaround for macOS compatibility issues.
post_rephrase_auto_select_all_checkbox: Automatically select all text in the focused field before post-rephrasing
post_rephrase_auto_select_all_tooltip: If enabled, the post-rephrase hotkey first sends 'Select All' to the currently focused field and then copies the full text. This saves you from manually selecting it before choosing a prompt.
recording_no_api_keys: Cannot start recording: API Key or Endpoint is not set.
test_connection_tooltip: Sends a short test audio to the transcription API to verify connectivity, proxy and API key.
conn_test_ok: ✅ Connection successful. The transcription API is reachable and the API key is valid.
conn_test_bad_key:
🔑 Connected to the API, but the API key was rejected (unauthorized). Please check your API key.

Details: {detail}
conn_test_bad_url:
🔗 The server was reached, but the endpoint was not found (HTTP 404/405). The API Endpoint URL is most likely wrong — please check it (e.g. it may be missing "/transcriptions").

Details: {detail}
conn_test_proxy:
🌐 Could not connect through the configured proxy. Please check the proxy URL / credentials.

Details: {detail}
conn_test_proxy_auth:
🌐 The proxy requires authentication (HTTP 407). Please add username/password to the proxy URL.

Details: {detail}
conn_test_ssl:
🔒 SSL error while connecting. A corporate proxy may be intercepting HTTPS; you may need to install/trust its certificate.

Details: {detail}
conn_test_reachable:
⚠️ The server is reachable and the connection/proxy are fine, but the request was rejected (e.g. wrong model or a server error). Please check the model and the endpoint URL.

Details: {detail}
conn_test_blocked:
🚫 Internet appears reachable, but the transcription API could not be reached. This usually means a firewall or a required (unconfigured) proxy is blocking outbound access.

Details: {detail}
conn_test_no_internet:
📴 No outbound connection detected. Either there is no internet connection, or all traffic must go through a proxy that is not configured.

Details: {detail}
conn_test_unknown:
⚠️ The connection test failed for an unexpected reason.

Details: {detail}
proxy_url_tooltip: Optional corporate proxy for all API requests, e.g. http://user:pass@proxy:8080. Leave empty to use the system/environment proxy settings.
use_px_proxy_checkbox: Use local proxy (px) at 127.0.0.1:3128 if running
use_px_proxy_tooltip: If no proxy URL is set above and the local px proxy (127.0.0.1:3128) is running, route all API requests through it. px handles corporate NTLM/Kerberos authentication automatically.
test_internet_tooltip: Checks basic internet connectivity to google.com using the current proxy / px settings.
internet_test_ok_px:
✅ Internet connection works via the local proxy (px).

Details: {detail}
internet_test_fail:
🚫 Could not reach the internet (test against google.com failed).

Details: {detail}
internet_test_px_hint: Note: a local proxy (px) is running on 127.0.0.1:3128 but is not being used. Enable the checkbox above to route through it.
log_retention_tooltip: Number of daily rotated log files to keep. At midnight a new log file is started and files older than this are deleted. 0 = keep only the current file.
transcribe_file_dialog_title: Choose audio or video file(s) to transcribe
batch_transcribe_done_message: {done} of {total} files transcribed & copied to clipboard
video_needs_ffmpeg_message: That's a video file. Set an FFmpeg path in Settings to transcribe videos.
compressing_audio_message: Compressing {filename} to fit the upload limit…
